description.en: Boston's Parker House hotel gave America its buttery dinner roll: a soft, potato-tender dough rolled thin, brushed with butter, and folded over on itself before the final rise so every roll pulls apart into two buttery layers.
description.de: Bostons Parker House Hotel schenkte Amerika sein buttriges Tischbrötchen: Ein weicher, durch Kartoffelmehl zarter Teig wird dünn ausgerollt, mit Butter bestrichen und vor dem Gehen gefaltet, sodass sich jedes Brötchen in zwei buttrige Schichten teilen lässt.
description.es: El hotel Parker House de Boston dio a Estados Unidos su panecillo de mantequilla: una masa suave y tierna por la fécula de patata se estira fina, se pinta con mantequilla y se dobla sobre sí misma antes de reposar, separándose luego en dos capas untuosas.
description.fr: L'hôtel Parker House de Boston a donné à l'Amérique son petit pain beurré : une pâte souple à la fécule de pomme de terre, étalée fine, badigeonnée de beurre puis repliée sur elle-même avant la pousse finale, pour deux couches beurrées bien distinctes.

origin.note: Created at the Parker House hotel, the same 19th-century Boston establishment credited with inventing Boston Cream Pie.

ingredients.note: potato flour, or dried potato flakes, for a tender crumb
melted, for folding into and brushing over the rolls

yield.shape: folded rectangular roll, about 2.25 x 3 inches

keeping.note: Reheats well; brush with a little extra melted butter after warming through.

method.title: Mix the dough
method.summary: Combine flour, potato flour, yeast, sugar, salt, softened butter, milk and egg into a soft, smooth dough.

method.title: First rise
method.summary: Let it rise in a covered bowl until doubled, about an hour.

method.title: Roll and butter
method.summary: Roll the dough into a rectangle and brush it generously with melted butter.

method.title: Fold
method.summary: Fold the dough over on itself lengthwise, leaving a small overhang, then cut into individual rolls.

method.title: Second rise
method.summary: Arrange snugly in a buttered pan and let rise until puffy, about 45 minutes.

method.title: Glaze
method.summary: Brush the hot rolls with more melted butter as soon as they come out of the oven.

source.adaptation: Grams kept as sourced; brushing butter counted into the fat total since it is folded into and over every roll.
